$schema_note: Per-cut proof and portability manifests. Evidence-only: every field is sourced from this repo (cuts/TAXONOMY.md, README.md, the cut files, lib/ grep). Unknowns are marked 'not found in repo' — nothing is invented. 'monolithic: true' means the cut does NOT load the lib/ stack (verified by grep for lib/boot.js|slate.js|state.js, 2026-06-18). Only cut 01 is modular.
sources: grep: which cuts load lib/boot.js (modular vs monolithic)

field_definitions.coordinate: From TAXONOMY.md: (loop-stage × altitude × surface × framing × maturity). Verbatim where TAXONOMY states it.
field_definitions.role: TAXONOMY 'convergence verdict' — what the cut is in the product model.
field_definitions.primitiveMadeVisible: The reusable primitive/pattern the cut demonstrates, where the repo names one.
field_definitions.loopTested: Which stage(s) of Capture→Read→Decide→Record→Re-enter the cut exercises, per TAXONOMY loop-stage.
field_definitions.subjectDomain: The subject the loop is pointed at (spend/custody/osint/etc.).
field_definitions.stateReality: hi-fi | mock | aspirational | frozen-artifact — from README status disclosures + TAXONOMY maturity. 'not found in repo' if undisclosed.
field_definitions.proof: What the cut actually demonstrates as evidence, per README/TAXONOMY. 'not found in repo' if the repo makes no proof claim.
field_definitions.choreography: Interaction/motion sequence. 'not found in repo' unless the repo documents it.
field_definitions.portability: What (if anything) is portable from this cut, per the audit. 'not found in repo' if unassessed.
field_definitions.monolithic: true = does NOT load lib/ (self-contained single file). Verified by grep 2026-06-18.
field_definitions.orphanedSpecRefs: Spec files the cut cites that are NOT present in this repo (likely in founder-brain or lost).
field_definitions.openQuestions: Unresolved items the repo itself flags or that this manifest surfaces.

orphanedSpecRefsGlobal.note: These spec files are referenced by cut files / lib comments / README but NOT FOUND IN REPO (verified 2026-06-18). They may live in founder-brain (gated) or be lost.

cuts.name: Agency — the subject is a parameter
cuts.role: The shell. Literally SUBJECTS={spend,custody,osint,notice,pattern}; the other cuts are panes of this. The convergence target made flesh.
cuts.primitiveMadeVisible: subject-as-parameter (one render loop, swappable subject + evidence pane)
cuts.stateReality: refining; README notes 'full parametric cut-00 collapse (half-built)' per LIMINAL_END_TO_END — partial
cuts.proof: Demonstrates one shell reskinning four registers per subject; per TAXONOMY cuts 02/03/08/09/molehunt are enumerated as its SUBJECTS
cuts.choreography: orbital agent-coverage viz with refusal arrows (per README); detailed sequence not found in repo
cuts.portability: not found in repo (not assessed in extraction audit at file level)
openQuestions: CUT_CONSOLIDATION_MAP.md is cited as its spec but NOT FOUND IN REPO
Whether to actually merge 00/08/09/11 into one parametric surface is deferred (TAXONOMY: larger product-build decision on the desktop spine)

cuts.name: Slate tray — the wedge / canonical front door
cuts.role: Canonical front door — the L1 reference render. The ONLY modular cut (consumes lib/boot.js).
cuts.stateReality: hi-fi / live (TAXONOMY maturity: live; README: demo-ready)
cuts.proof: The bounded-refusal loop running with real Tray→Slate composition; per FRONT_DOOR_DECISION_2026-05-12 this is the designated front door
cuts.choreography: magnetic-hover + press physics on high-value controls (per recent commits); tile settle animation on landing
cuts.portability: Highest — its lib/ stack (state.js, vault-store.js, undo.js, keyboard.js) holds the audit's top extraction candidates
openQuestions: Speedrun-register hero is a toggle inside this cut (consolidated from former separate files) — verify no dead toggle paths

cuts.name: Forensic agent — contradicting-notification diligence loop
cuts.role: A Read-stage detail of L1 → cut-00 evidence pane candidate
cuts.primitiveMadeVisible: contradiction-surfacing read (the disagreement IS the signal)
cuts.stateReality: refining (TAXONOMY maturity); README does not give a hi-fi/mock disclosure — partial
cuts.proof: not found in repo (no explicit proof claim beyond the Read-stage demo)
cuts.portability: not found in repo (candidate to fold into cut-00 evidence pane, not a standalone extraction)
openQuestions: Identified in TAXONOMY as a cut-00 subject-pane candidate, not a standalone surface

cuts.name: Calibration — 12wk × 4-register vault heatmap
cuts.coordinate: Record (over time) × L1→L2 × desktop × infra × refining
cuts.role: Record view; the 'pattern' subject of cut 00 (the moat made visible)
cuts.primitiveMadeVisible: correction-density heatmap (the vault record as a visible moat)
cuts.stateReality: mock — README: 'renders a seeded illustrative baseline with any real corrections merged on top' (in-UI disclosure)
cuts.proof: Illustrative; explicitly NOT a weak-vs-strong-model comparison (README: 'the architectural bet, not yet a demonstrated result')
openQuestions: Seeded baseline vs real corrections — the proof is illustrative, not measured

cuts.name: Onboarding — first-touch
cuts.role: First-touch; orthogonal (entry, not a loop subject). Consolidates three earlier explorations now in cuts/_archive/.
cuts.primitiveMadeVisible: first-run onboarding (the redline / delta as the onboarding)
cuts.proof: not found in repo (no proof claim — it is an entry surface)
cuts.choreography: not found in repo (sequence in cuts/onboarding/ not audited here)
openQuestions: Access tier noted as pilot v0.1 in TAXONOMY — a viewing-context note, not a coordinate field

cuts.name: Liminal Custody — NatSec/defense surface
cuts.role: A subject of cut 00 (custody); proof-of-travel (the substrate generalizes beyond founders)
cuts.primitiveMadeVisible: the loop under maximum operational constraint (overload, ambiguity, accountability)
cuts.stateReality: sketch (TAXONOMY maturity); README frames it as architecture under constraint — not wired to a live kernel
cuts.proof: Claim per README/index: 'Built at NatSec May 2–3. Top 16 of 102 in 48 hours.' (event claim, sourced to README; not a code-level proof in this repo)
cuts.portability: not found in repo (a cut-00 subject pane, not a standalone extraction)
openQuestions: Largest single cut file (~104KB) — monolithic; flagged in audit §7 as overly large
Proof is an event/competition claim, not in-repo demonstrated

cuts.name: OSINT Custody — the loop wired to the real kernel
cuts.coordinate: full-loop (live kernel) × L3-high-stakes × desktop × infra × live
cuts.role: A subject of cut 00 (osint); the real-kernel proof
cuts.stateReality: live loop + frozen-artifact provenance — README: kernel runs live via lib/osint-kernel.bundle.js; on-chain provenance is a localnet snapshot (2026-05-28), NOT publicly verifiable
cuts.proof: Real loop recomputed each run (in-browser kernel); provenance snapshot is recorded localnet, softened in copy per LIM-1135
cuts.choreography: DARPA DISCORD register toggle (per README); detailed sequence not found in repo
cuts.portability: osint-kernel.bundle.js is a FROZEN ARTIFACT — source (../liminal-test) not in workspace; build:kernel cannot regenerate it. Treat as opaque (audit §4, REPO_ATLAS §3).
openQuestions: Kernel source not in workspace — bundle is opaque and unregenerable here
On-chain provenance is localnet, not publicly verifiable

cuts.name: Today — re-entry, the loop closes
cuts.role: The Re-enter stage; closes the loop. TAXONOMY notes it 'already thinks in coordinates.'
cuts.primitiveMadeVisible: overnight re-read of held compositions (the loop made a place)
cuts.proof: Demonstrates the Re-enter stage closing the loop; 'you say how it landed' is what makes calibration real (README framing, not a measured result)
openQuestions: Renamed from 09-today on 2026-06-11 to resolve a slot collision — verify no stale 09-today references remain

cuts.name: Govern — correction is the interaction (the agency loop)
cuts.coordinate: full-loop (agent fleet) × L1→L2 × desktop × wedge→infra × live
cuts.role: The seam cut — the wedge→infra pricing seam in miniature; the loop turned on the agent fleet itself.
cuts.primitiveMadeVisible: correction-as-primary-interaction; provenance click-through (finding → cited rows + SHA-256 receipt); ⌘K palette; OKR allocation bar
cuts.stateReality: live (TAXONOMY maturity); recently rebuilt to v3 to demonstrate provenance (per LIMINAL_END_TO_END §4)
cuts.proof: Click a finding → its cited rows + SHA-256 receipt; reconciliation ($486→−$162→$324); chain-integrity badge (per LIMINAL_END_TO_END §4)
cuts.choreography: ⌘K to drive it; correction as primary move; loop returns each morning (Today) + Mirror reflect-back
cuts.portability: ⌘K palette is reimplemented here AND in surface-nav.js (audit §7 duplication finding) — a consolidation candidate, not a clean extraction
openQuestions: Cites HCI_AUDIT.md + RECONCILED_SYSTEM.md as specs — both NOT FOUND IN REPO
Grew +722 lines in a recent merge — audit §7 flags product logic accreting inside a demo file
